title: At the Pharmacy
description: Describing symptoms and asking for over-the-counter medicine at a pharmacy.
summary_pt_br: Farmácia em inglês: headache, sore throat, cough. 'Preciso de receita?', 'De quanto em quanto tempo?', 'Tem efeito colateral?'.

scenes.subtitle_en: Describing symptoms and asking for over-the-counter medicine at a pharmacy.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Farmácia em inglês: headache, sore throat, cough. 'Preciso de receita?', 'De quanto em quanto tempo?', 'Tem efeito colateral?'.

scenes.text_en: Describing symptoms and asking for over-the-counter medicine at a pharmacy. Today's focus: at the pharmacy. I have a terrible headache and a mild fever.
scenes.text_pt: Farmácia em inglês: headache, sore throat, cough. 'Preciso de receita?', 'De quanto em quanto tempo?', 'Tem efeito colateral?'. Foco de hoje: at the pharmacy. Estou com dor de cabeça forte e febrezinha.

scenes.title: At the Pharmacy
scenes.body_en: Key phrases: 'I have a headache / sore throat / cough.', 'Do I need a prescription?', 'How often should I take it?', 'Does it have side effects?'
scenes.body_pt: Farmácia em inglês: headache, sore throat, cough. 'Preciso de receita?', 'De quanto em quanto tempo?', 'Tem efeito colateral?'.

examples.en: I have a terrible headache and a mild fever.
examples.pt: Estou com dor de cabeça forte e febrezinha.

examples.en: Do I need a prescription for this medicine?
examples.pt: Preciso de receita pra esse remédio?

examples.en: How often should I take the tablets?
examples.pt: De quanto em quanto tempo tomo os comprimidos?

exercise.question: Complete: "I have a ___ headache and a mild fever."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "I have a terrible headache and a mild fever."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Estou com dor de cabeça forte e febrezinha.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: Do I need a prescription for this medicine?
I haven't heard anything about that.
exercise.explanation: The correct sentence is: "Do I need a prescription for this medicine?"
exercise.hint_pt_br: Preciso de receita pra esse remédio?

exercise.explanation: Five key terms from the lesson. Match each English word to its Portuguese meaning.

scenes.title: At the Pharmacy — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre at the pharmacy. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Good afternoon. How can I help you today?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I have a bad sore throat and some fever.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: How long have you had these symptoms?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: I can recommend an over-the-counter painkiller.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Do I need a prescription for anything stronger?
turns.pt_hint: Precisa de receita pra algo mais forte?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Yes, antibiotics require a doctor's note.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: How often should I take these tablets?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: One every eight hours with food, please.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Are there any serious side effects?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Mild drowsiness in some people, nothing serious.

scenes.title: Dona Lúcia at the pharmacy
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, detalhes e sua opinião. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe Dona Lúcia's symptoms and the pharmacist's advice. Use at least three medical phrases.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Resumo curto com quem falou, o que disseram e sua opinião.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Dona Lúcia walked slowly into the pharmacy, carrying a shopping bag and a worried face.

paragraphs.speaker: Lúcia
paragraphs.en: I have a terrible headache and a sore throat that won't go away.

paragraphs.speaker: Pharmacist
paragraphs.en: How long have you had these symptoms, and have you taken any medicine?

paragraphs.speaker: Lúcia
paragraphs.en: Only some tea for three days. I usually avoid pills at my age.

paragraphs.speaker: Pharmacist
paragraphs.en: Take this painkiller every eight hours with food, and rest as much as you can.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Three days of rest and a friendly pharmacist — sometimes the simplest prescription works best.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "At the Pharmacy". Describing symptoms and asking for over-the-counter medicine at a pharmacy. I have a terrible headache and a mild fever. Do I need a prescription for this medicine? Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: Prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "At the Pharmacy". I liked it because it was clear and useful. See you next time!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule from last year
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "At the Pharmacy".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para continuar praticando. Salve os links e volte sempre.

sources.label: BBC 6 Minute English
sources.pt_hint: Podcast curto com transcrição — nível B1.

sources.label: VOA Learning English
sources.pt_hint: Notícias e áudios em inglês adaptado.
